name: jump-8bit
description: The platformer jump: a square wave swept exponentially upward and gated by a fast-decay envelope. Replay with: tono replay docs/examples/jump-8bit.json

steps.note: An exponential 160 to 720 Hz sweep reads as effort-then-liftoff; linear sweeps sound like sirens. punch gives the takeoff a click; sustain 0 means the sound is gone the moment the character leaves the ground.
